prompt: Create a photorealistic full-body fashion portrait of an adult woman standing in a modern luxury apartment hallway, posed with one hand on her hip and the other relaxed near her shorts, legs crossed slightly. She has bright blue hair visible under a red Ferrari baseball cap with a yellow shield logo. Her face should be intentionally obscured by a soft rectangular blur for privacy. She wears a coordinated sporty red racing-inspired outfit: exactly 5 visible outfit pieces — a sleeveless high-neck red crop top with the large white number “52” across the chest, matching red short shorts with white side stripes and a small white “52” on one leg, sheer black pantyhose, black ankle-strap platform stiletto sandals, and a delicate silver waist chain. Use a realistic smartphone-photo aesthetic with natural indoor light, shallow depth of field, accurate fabric texture, skin texture, and reflections on polished marble flooring. Background: tall dark wood doors, pale walls, door frames, and a clean upscale corridor receding into soft blur. Composition should be vertical 9:16, full body centered, camera at about waist height, realistic proportions, cinematic realism, no text beyond the visible numbers and logo.
